checks.name: No unsupported claims
checks.evidence: Unsafe-phrase scan passed after allowing explicit negative contexts such as must_not_claim, unsupported, excluded, and no/not claim boundaries.

checks.name: No raw private data committed
checks.evidence: Changed-file scan found no added raw-data or large-artifact extensions among branch changes.

checks.name: No raw sequence strings shown on public pages
checks.evidence: Long amino-acid-like sequence pattern scan passed across docs, projects, notebooks, reports, and public summaries.

checks.name: All project links work
checks.evidence: Local HTML internal links and assets passed. After branch push and Pages build, homepage, flagship project pages, and key figure assets returned HTTP 200.

checks.name: Each flagship project has required assets
checks.evidence: Each flagship has a project page, README, figure, metrics summary, limitations section, and reproducibility section, including reaction-yield ML.

checks.name: Homepage can be understood in 30 seconds
checks.evidence: Homepage includes identity, role focus, skill matrix, four flagship cards, selected tools, and contact links without overloading secondary projects.

checks.name: Recruiter can identify domain, tools, and outputs in 60 seconds
checks.evidence: Homepage, skills page, CV page, README, and recruiter summary expose domain, methods, tools, outputs, and limitations.

checks.name: No therapeutic-design claims
checks.evidence: Therapeutic design appears only as a prohibited or negated claim boundary.

checks.name: No production-grade claims for baseline ML projects
checks.evidence: Production-grade appears only as a negated/boundary phrase for EGFR baseline QSAR.

commands_run: make reproduce-small / make figures / make report for antibody-sequence-ml
make reproduce-small / make figures / make report for egfr-cadd-qsar-admet
make reproduce-small / make figures / make report for polymer-md
local HTML href/src internal link and asset check
python JSON validity check for reaction-yield notebook and metrics
local HTML href/src internal link and asset check after adding reaction-yield pages
unsupported_claims_removed_or_marked: Therapeutic antibody design claims are explicitly excluded.
Production-grade EGFR predictor claims are explicitly excluded.
Clinical utility claims are explicitly excluded.
Standalone materials property-prediction claims are explicitly excluded.
Operational reaction-synthesis guidance is explicitly excluded.
Generated-chemistry and guaranteed-success claims are explicitly excluded.
recommended_manual_review_items: Confirm preferred public contact email before final publishing.
Add verified LinkedIn URL if Eva wants it public.
Review phd-notes assets before using unpublished thesis/manuscript content publicly.
Run a browser visual review of the GitHub Pages URL after Pages finishes deployment.
Review raw-source license terms before publicly redistributing any raw reaction-yield workbook or full row-level table.
